claims.name: CREAK truth Cohen's d
claims.statement: A ridge probe trained at the end-of-turn token (Gemma-3-27B, layer 32) discriminates true vs false CREAK claims at the user turn with Cohen's d under the default (neutral) persona.
claims.derivation: filter user-turn items to domain=='truth' and system_prompt=='neutral'; take `probe_scores["tb-5_L32"]`; pooled Cohen's d(true, false); round to 2dp.

claims.name: CREAK truth n true
claims.statement: Number of true CREAK claims in the end-of-turn base discrimination panel (user-turn framing, default persona).
claims.derivation: count of user-turn items with domain=='truth', system_prompt=='neutral', condition=='true'.

claims.name: CREAK truth n false
claims.statement: Number of false CREAK claims in the end-of-turn base discrimination panel (user-turn framing, default persona).
claims.derivation: count of user-turn items with domain=='truth', system_prompt=='neutral', condition=='false'.

claims.name: BailBench harm absolute Cohen's d
claims.statement: Magnitude of the end-of-turn probe's Cohen's d (Gemma-3-27B, layer 32) discriminating harmful vs benign BailBench items at the user turn under the default persona; reported as |d| in sec:induced-roleplay.
claims.derivation: filter user-turn items to domain=='harm' and system_prompt=='neutral'; take `probe_scores["tb-5_L32"]`; abs(pooled Cohen's d(harmful, benign)); round to 2dp.

claims.name: BailBench harm n harmful
claims.statement: Number of harmful BailBench items in the end-of-turn base discrimination panel (user turn, neutral persona).
claims.derivation: count of user-turn items with domain=='harm', system_prompt=='neutral', condition=='harmful'.

claims.name: BailBench harm n benign
claims.statement: Number of benign BailBench items in the end-of-turn base discrimination panel (user turn, neutral persona).
claims.derivation: count of user-turn items with domain=='harm', system_prompt=='neutral', condition=='benign'.

claims.name: Truth d under neutral persona
claims.statement: Cohen's d for true vs false separation under the neutral system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L32).
claims.derivation: `persona_modulation["truth"]["neutral"]` from compute_persona_modulation_d_full(assistant_items): filter to domain=='truth' and system_prompt=='neutral', take `probe_scores["tb-5_L32"]`; pooled Cohen's d(true, false); round to 2dp.

claims.name: Truth d under lie directive
claims.statement: Cohen's d for true vs false separation under the lie_directive system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L32); negative sign indicates the probe's evaluative readout has flipped.
claims.derivation: `persona_modulation["truth"]["lie_directive"]` from compute_persona_modulation_d_full(assistant_items): filter to domain=='truth' and system_prompt=='lie_directive', take `probe_scores["tb-5_L32"]`; pooled Cohen's d(true, false); round to 2dp.

claims.name: Truth d under pathological liar
claims.statement: Cohen's d for true vs false separation under the pathological_liar system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L32).
claims.derivation: `persona_modulation["truth"]["pathological_liar"]` from compute_persona_modulation_d_full(assistant_items): filter to domain=='truth' and system_prompt=='pathological_liar', take `probe_scores["tb-5_L32"]`; pooled Cohen's d(true, false); round to 2dp.

claims.name: Harm d under neutral persona
claims.statement: Cohen's d for harmful vs benign separation under the neutral system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L32).
claims.derivation: `persona_modulation["harm"]["neutral"]` from compute_persona_modulation_d_full(assistant_items): filter to domain=='harm' and system_prompt=='neutral', take `probe_scores["tb-5_L32"]`; pooled Cohen's d(harmful, benign); round to 2dp.

claims.name: Harm d under sadist persona
claims.statement: Cohen's d for harmful vs benign separation under the sadist system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L32); the distributions collapse.
claims.derivation: `persona_modulation["harm"]["sadist"]` from compute_persona_modulation_d_full(assistant_items): filter to domain=='harm' and system_prompt=='sadist', take `probe_scores["tb-5_L32"]`; pooled Cohen's d(harmful, benign); round to 2dp.

claims.name: Politics d under democrat prompt
claims.statement: Cohen's d for left vs right separation under a democrat system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L32).
claims.derivation: `persona_modulation["politics"]["democrat"]` from compute_persona_modulation_d_full(assistant_items): filter to domain=='politics' and system_prompt=='democrat', take `probe_scores["tb-5_L32"]`; pooled Cohen's d(left, right); round to 2dp.

claims.name: Politics d under republican prompt
claims.statement: Cohen's d for left vs right separation under a republican system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L32); negative sign indicates right>left.
claims.derivation: `persona_modulation["politics"]["republican"]` from compute_persona_modulation_d_full(assistant_items): filter to domain=='politics' and system_prompt=='republican', take `probe_scores["tb-5_L32"]`; pooled Cohen's d(left, right); round to 2dp.

claims.name: Persona modulation d full
claims.statement: Cohen's d for class separation under each system prompt (assistant turn, end-of-turn probe), Gemma-3-27B. Outer key: domain; inner key: system_prompt; value: Cohen's d (positive endpoint vs negative endpoint per the domain's class scheme), rounded to 2dp.
claims.derivation: For each (domain, system_prompt) cell in PERSONA_MODULATION_ORDER, filter assistant-turn items, take `probe_scores[<probe>]`, compute pooled Cohen's d, round to 2dp.

claims.name: Per turn parent absolute d
claims.statement: Absolute Cohen's d of the task-averaged parent probe (task_mean_L32 for both truth and harm) under the neutral system prompt, per (domain, turn).
claims.derivation: For each (domain, turn) cell, filter to system_prompt=='neutral', take `probe_scores[<task_mean_L*>]`, compute pooled Cohen's d, report abs(d), round to 2dp.

claims.name: Per turn absolute d truth
claims.statement: Absolute Cohen's d for true vs false separation under the neutral system prompt, per (turn, probe family). Probe families: end-of-turn = tb-5_L32; role-marker = tb-2_L32.
claims.derivation: For each (turn, probe-family) cell, filter to domain=='truth' and system_prompt=='neutral', take `probe_scores[<probe>]`, compute pooled Cohen's d, report abs(d), round to 2dp.

claims.name: Per turn absolute d harm
claims.statement: Absolute Cohen's d for harmful vs benign separation under the neutral system prompt, per (turn, probe family). Probe families: end-of-turn = tb-5_L32; role-marker = tb-2_L32.
claims.derivation: For each (turn, probe-family) cell, filter to domain=='harm' and system_prompt=='neutral', take `probe_scores[<probe>]`, compute pooled Cohen's d, report abs(d), round to 2dp.
